text:
There once was a girl named Alice who lived with her cat. One day they heard laughter outside.

They slid open the window curtains and watched. There was a group of children playing outside singing. Alice giggled softly.

That night she dreamed of singing children. In a whirlwind of bright colors, she flew out the window.

She fluttered down beside them. Everyone looked startled.

"Well," she squeaked. "How about a game?"

"Oh," they said timidly. A boy blew kisses.

She flew around their heads weaving webs of giggles.

Soon laughter filled the air and soon it was dusk.

Alice flew back into her bedroom just before dawn.

She wouldn't share tales from dreams ever again.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
